ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., EU-wide) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary language of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Primary currency code of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping service (e.g., DHL, Bookpost) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping service */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping carrier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_services_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES shipping_carriers ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping rate */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping service */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for this rate */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for this rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Shipping rate */,
  "free_shipping_threshold" REAL /* Minimum order value for free shipping */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the rate */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate is discounted */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage if applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES shipping_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "item_cost" REAL /* Cost of the item */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "item_total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the item after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Preferred language code */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Preferred currency code */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to newsletters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping service */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipping_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_service_id") REFERENCES shipping_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping carrier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping carrier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the carrier is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery time */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "min_days" INTEGER /* Minimum number of days for delivery */,
  "max_days" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days for delivery */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the delivery time is estimated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_times_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_shipping_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free shipping threshold */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "min_order_value" REAL /* Minimum order value for free shipping */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the threshold */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the threshold is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_shipping_thresholds_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_based_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight-based rate */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for this rate */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for this rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Shipping rate */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the rate */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate is discounted */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage if applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weight_based_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "from_currency" TEXT /* From currency */,
  "to_currency" TEXT /* To currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, fr, de) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the user permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_status_history_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_status_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
